question: Can a Chronicle-backed adventure contract verify a witnessed, resource-matched cross-plane round trip while rejecting forged plane, anchor, cooldown, return, and cultural-fact traces?
experimental_unit: one deterministic verifier fixture case built from an independently seeded Chronicle gate journey

hypotheses.prediction: Every untampered Chronicle round trip passes all declared hard verifiers on discovery, confirmation, and holdout seeds.
hypotheses.falsifier: Any untampered round trip is rejected.

hypotheses.prediction: Every one-at-a-time plane, cooldown, return, resource, evidence, claim, integrity, or metric-firewall tamper is rejected on every seed.
hypotheses.falsifier: Any tampered round trip is accepted.

hypotheses.prediction: Each adversarial fixture triggers its predeclared verifier or configuration firewall.
hypotheses.falsifier: A fixture is rejected only for an unrelated reason or is not rejected.

model.update_order: Build a deterministic Chronicle stream containing an outbound transfer, active-cooldown rejection, meme attachment, insight drift, and return transfer; normalize it; build a valid witnessed adventure; apply one declared fixture mutation; run all hard and diagnostic verifiers.
model.rng: The seed deterministically selects IDs, anchors, and the destination plane. Event construction and verifier execution consume no randomness.

seed_plan.pairing: All scenario fixtures for one seed are deep copies of the same valid Chronicle task, trace, and canonical environment; exactly one declared mutation is applied.

denominators.fixture_detection_rate: detected cases divided by independently seeded cases for the exact fixture class
denominators.valid_acceptance_rate: accepted valid controls divided by valid controls

exposure.eligibility: Every source stream contains two successful gate transfers, one active-cooldown rejection, one meme attachment, and one insight drift.
exposure.activation: Every valid trace follows both transfers and witnesses the cultural events before claiming them; every tampered case applies exactly one named mutation.
exposure.state_change: The source stream records outbound and return target planes, anchor positions, cooldown before/after state, meme pressure change, and insight-kind drift.

analysis.uncertainty: Complete deterministic fixture enumeration over four source seeds; no tick-, event-, or claim-level pseudoreplication.
analysis.multiple_comparisons: All nine predeclared tamper classes and the valid control are retained; no verifier champion is selected.
analysis.stopping_rule: Stop after 40 cases, 60 wall seconds, 512 MB RSS, failed source replay, missing treatment exposure, or any expectation mismatch.
analysis.acceptance_boundary: This is operational verification evidence for the declared deterministic fixtures. It is not evidence of adventurer intelligence, meme cognition, narrative truth beyond witnessed events, or universal exploit resistance.

budget.execution: Sequential local CPU execution; pure fixture construction and verifier calls; no external models or APIs.
